(module 11_env_or_default
  (extern defun env_read ((key : Str)) : Str @capability "env.get")

  (defun home_or ((fallback : Str)) : Str

        fallback
        (env_read "HOME")))

    (assert-eq (home_or "/nowhere") "/nowhere"))

  (test present_wins

  (test semiannual    (assert-near (compound 2000 6 2 3) 2388.10 0.05))
